title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data, alongside Vera (an agent CPU layer) and the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot. Together they form a complete physical AI stack enabling robots to perceive, plan, and act in the physical world.
